titleStmt.title: SII 24.32: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 32. (A.R. No. 136 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by sale to Śēndamaṅgalamuḍaiyāṉ Jayaṅgoṇḍśōḻaṉ alias Sēnāpati Iḷaṅgōvēḷār for a garden to be named Kiḍāraṅgoṇḍaviḷāgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tu viḷaṅka [jayamātu virum]pa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟc ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara tarāt tik kaṉaittun tan cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻutu kulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu tinacin=tāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyi lukkuc ciykāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ Ārkkāṭṭu Evaṟpaṭi perumpaṟṟappuliyūr nārāyaṇan dāsarum Irāyūr cicaṭakopanampiyum kāñ cikku tiruvaraṅkattamutum Eṭṭukkūrum
ṟum civa m Āritan Ārāvamutum ṟum pāratāyan cirāman tuḻā pan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum Āritan periyānum Āritan kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkamum kavucikan nānūṟṟu vappiriyanum Āvaṭip Ārā vamutu viliyāna civayiṣṇavappiriyanum Āka Ivvanaivom centamaṅkala muṭaiyān jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻanāna senāpati Iḷaṅkoveḷarkku Inta nilamāvatu Āḻvār rājamahentravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūraāna taṇṭuṟai Uttecam Āṟuṭaintu maṇa
liṭāy payir ceytuuṇṇātu kiṭan=ta nilattil kiṭāraṅkoṇṭān tirunan=tavanattuk n=tavanappuṟamāka kiṭāraṅkoṇṭān viḷākattukku nilam mukkālukkum kiṭāraṅkoṇ ṭān maṭat kiḻpāṟkellai ṟkellai pacalai rāyar viḷākattu maṇṇilaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai manaiya kon viḷākattu ku kiḻakkum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan viḷākattukku vicain=ta perunān kellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam 1(1/4)(1/2) vār ci paṇṭārattu Oṭukkina vi
kācu 1(1/4) Onṟe kālum Oṭukkuvittuk koḷḷa Ik kaṭāraṅkoṇṭa tirunan=tavānañ ceyvikkiṟa senāpatikaḷ Iḷaṅkoveḷārkku Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom yilil Irukkum civayi[ṣṇava ]ppuṟattu tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampi maṭattil cey pātiyum tiru nan=tavānappuṟattil cey pātiyum ceyyakka ṭavā m nikki ninṟa cci caṭa kopanum Ivan tampi num Ittirunan=tavānappuṟattil ceypātiyum maṭattil ceypātiyum ka Aṭuttukka kuṭuttom Āḻvā
rkanmikaḷom Innilam Onṟekālum tiruttaṟattirutti veli Onṟukku paḷḷikkoṇṭān marakkālāl puncey varicai Aḷakkum 2ḷa7 Innilattāl vanta puncey ndha Āḻvār śrī paṇṭāratte Aḷakkak kaṭava ttil puncey varicai I kiṭāraṅkoṇṭān tirunan=tavānañ ceykiṟa tirunāṭuṭaiyānampi Uḷ ḷiṭṭār mūvarkku ḷa+ku perāl 2nya Āka van=ta nellum Āṇṭu varai Iṭavai mu kkiṭāraṅkoṇṭān maṭam nokki Iruppānukku ḷa+(1/2) ñcāṭi Āka van=ta ḷa Āṇṭu varai puṭavai muta Uḷḷa nellāl kalam Onṟu
civayiṣṇava kaḷai Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavitākavum Iṭaiyānampi m maṭamum ceyya vaṟkattu kaṭavarkaḷāka Isenāpatikaḷ Iḷaṅko kūttanāna Damaged and lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
